arts.ttl: Milan in Talks for Salzburg Midfielder Lucas Gourna-Douath
arts.sum: AC Milan have entered negotiations for Lucas Gourna-Douath, the young French midfielder currently playing for Red Bull Salzburg. The 21-year-old has caught the eye of the Rossoneri management as they look to strengthen their midfield options in the January transfer window. arts.ttl: Serie A | Milan v Cagliari: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Rafael Leao could make his first start under new manager Sergio Conceicao in AC Milan's upcoming match against Cagliari. The Portuguese winger, who made a significant impact as a substitute in Milan's recent Super Cup triumph, has a strong record against the Sardinian side, having scored five league goals against them, including one in each of their last two encounters at San Siro.
